name: Thai Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine rice, chicken, spinach, red pepper, mushrooms, peanuts, green onions, mint and cilantro.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together hot water, rice vinegar, peanut butter, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic and ground red pepper until smooth.
3. Pour the dressing over salad; toss to coat.
4. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and unsalted peanuts before serving.
